_metadata.title: Enable Access Reviews for Privileged Roles
_metadata.description: Configures recurring access reviews for all privileged directory roles to ensure least-privilege access. Reviewers must confirm each user's need for the role quarterly.
_metadata.requiredLicence: Entra ID P2 or Microsoft Entra ID Governance

graphApiCalls.description: Create quarterly access review for Global Administrator role

body.descriptionForAdmins: Quarterly review of Global Administrator role assignments to ensure least-privilege compliance
body.descriptionForReviewers: Please verify this user still requires Global Administrator access. Remove if no longer needed.

postDeployment: Verify the access review was created: Get-MgIdentityGovernanceAccessReviewDefinition
Ensure reviewers receive notification emails within 24 hours of start date
Configure additional reviews for other privileged roles (Privileged Role Administrator, Exchange Administrator, etc.)
